vulnerabilities.description: The `create` function in `group.repository.ts` accepts `groupData` of type `any` which can lead to potential NoSQL Injection if unsanitized input reaches this point.
vulnerabilities.fix: Restrict `groupData` to a defined DTO and ensure all inputs are sanitized and validated before passing to the repository layer.

vulnerabilities.description: In `group.service.ts`, `createGroup` converts `adminId` to `ObjectId` without checking if `adminId` is a valid ObjectId.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use a validation library to ensure `adminId` is a valid MongoDB ObjectId before conversion.

vulnerabilities.description: The `findAll` method in `group.repository.ts` does not implement pagination, risking performance issues with large datasets.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement pagination in the `findAll` method to handle large datasets efficiently.

vulnerabilities.description: RBAC is not explicitly checked in methods that modify group data, such as `linkTelegram` in `group.service.ts`.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add role-based access control checks to ensure only users with appropriate permissions can modify group data.
